title: Fagarastrum natalense
taxonomy: Fagarastrum natalense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, which is commonly known as the citrus family. It is a small tree or shrub that is native to the region of Natal in South Africa. The plant is further classified as a member of the genus Fagarastrum within the Rutaceae family. The classification of Fagarastrum natalense is also supported by its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic analysis. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships among the species within the Rutaceae family.
